title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 28 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 28 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 28 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/02/2024
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower, continued to ﬂuctuate in a day by 1.08%. Traders ship according to market conditions . Some steel mills purchased on demand.
